name: oxgraph
description: Codebase dependency visualizer and call graph generator

scripts.clean: shx rm -rf packages/core/target packages/core/*.node packages/ui/dist packages/cli/public-ui packages/cli/dist
scripts.type-check: pnpm run type-check:ui && pnpm run type-check:cli
scripts.lint: pnpm run type-check && pnpm run lint:core && pnpm run lint:ui && pnpm run lint:cli
scripts.test: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:ui && pnpm run test:cli
scripts.format:fix: pnpm run format:fix:core && pnpm run format:fix:ui && pnpm run format:fix:cli
scripts.format:check: pnpm run format:check:core && pnpm run format:check:ui && pnpm run format:check:cli
